Approval matrix and approval record template are maintainer review aids.

The Gmsh evidence was reviewed and accepted as optional manual mesh-generation smoke evidence; it does not authorize further solver execution.
Optiland evidence was reviewed and accepted as optional manual ray/path smoke evidence; it does not authorize further solver execution.
Gmsh was not rerun by the Optiland or Meep tasks; Optiland was not rerun by the Meep task.
Meep has a separate approved 2026-05-20 Meep-only optional micro-benchmark pass recorded as PyMeep/FDTD smoke evidence.

solvers.approval_phrase: I approve running the optional gmsh micro-benchmark for optical-spec-agent.
solvers.expected_runtime_environment: Local environment with gmsh available on PATH after explicit maintainer approval.
solvers.last_execution_scope: Gmsh only for the earlier approved run; Optiland and Meep were executed later under separate approvals; MPB/Elmer not executed.
solvers.recommended_next_action: Gmsh evidence is reviewed and accepted as optional manual mesh-generation smoke evidence. Meep and Optiland have separate recorded evidence; no future Gmsh rerun is authorized.

solvers.approval_phrase: I approve running the optional Meep micro-benchmark for optical-spec-agent using OSA_SOLVER_PYTHON=<path>.
solvers.expected_runtime_environment: Local Python environment with PyMeep importable after explicit maintainer approval.
solvers.last_execution_scope: Meep only for the approved Meep run using OSA_SOLVER_PYTHON; Gmsh and Optiland were not rerun; MPB/Elmer not executed.
solvers.recommended_next_action: Meep evidence is recorded as optional manual PyMeep/FDTD smoke evidence. MPB requires separate OSA_SOLVER_PYTHON approval before any execution; no future Meep rerun is authorized.

solvers.approval_phrase: I approve running the optional mpb micro-benchmark for optical-spec-agent.
solvers.expected_runtime_environment: Local Python environment with meep.mpb importable after explicit maintainer approval.
solvers.recommended_next_action: MPB remains not executed. It requires separate explicit maintainer approval and OSA_SOLVER_PYTHON before any opt-in run.

solvers.approval_phrase: I approve running the optional optiland micro-benchmark for optical-spec-agent.
solvers.expected_runtime_environment: Local Python environment with Optiland importable after explicit maintainer approval.
solvers.last_execution_scope: Optiland only for the approved Optiland run; Gmsh was earlier and Meep was later under separate approvals; MPB/Elmer not executed.
solvers.recommended_next_action: Optiland evidence is reviewed and accepted as optional manual ray/path smoke evidence. Meep has separate recorded smoke evidence; no future Optiland rerun is authorized.

solvers.approval_phrase: I approve running the optional elmer micro-benchmark for optical-spec-agent.

solvers.recommended_next_action: Keep Elmer deferred until a maintainable ElmerSolver install route exists and a new explicit approval is recorded.

preview_boundary_summary.adapters: Adapter-native source/monitor mappings are preview metadata; real results require explicit solver execution.
preview_boundary_summary.application_domains: Benchmarks verify deterministic routing, missing-input diagnostics, and blocked actions, not physical correctness.
preview_boundary_summary.calculators: Sanity-checked preview/design-assist calculators; physical validation remains user responsibility.
preview_boundary_summary.materials: Local curated preview catalog; not a production-grade optical constants database.
preview_boundary_summary.optional_solver_micro_benchmarks: Open-source solver-backed micro-benchmarks are optional/manual/explicit opt-in only; readiness checks detect availability only, can be calibrated with OSA_SOLVER_PYTHON for solver-specific Python profiles, include pending/deferred per-solver approval records and one-solver-at-a-time sequencing, record the Gmsh-only optional manual micro-benchmark pass from 2026-05-20 as reviewed mesh-generation smoke evidence, record the separately approved Optiland-only pass from 2026-05-20 as reviewed ray/path smoke evidence, record the separately approved Meep-only pass from 2026-05-20 as optional manual PyMeep/FDTD smoke evidence through OSA_SOLVER_PYTHON, keep MPB unapproved pending OSA_SOLVER_PYTHON-specific approval, and default gates do not run solvers.
preview_boundary_summary.pypi: PyPI publication would not imply production-grade validation.
preview_boundary_summary.sub_agents: Sub-agent traces show deterministic local role execution, not independent autonomous services.

source_monitor_observable_diagnostics.monitor_metadata: preview-only; no real solver monitor result is claimed.
